creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/art/#bsd-daemon>

> BSD Daemon

– refers to non-existent <https://www.freebsd.org/art/..copyright/>. 

mckusick@ please: to fix this, which of the following targets would you prefer? 

<https://www.freebsd.org/copyright/>

<https://www.freebsd.org/copyright/daemon/>

I guess, the latter; it's (also) linked from under <https://www.freebsd.org/art/#use>.
